description: ChromaDB is an open-source AI-native vector database. It stores embeddings and allows fast cosine similarity search. It persists data locally in SQLite with no external server required.
use_case: Used in this project to store document embeddings and retrieve relevant chunks at query time.

description: A lightweight sentence transformer model that converts text into 384-dimensional dense vectors. It runs on CPU without a GPU and produces high-quality semantic embeddings for retrieval tasks.
use_case: Used to embed document chunks during ingestion and to embed user queries at retrieval time.

description: Groq provides fast AI inference using custom LPU hardware. It supports models including LLaMA 3, Mixtral, and Gemma. The API is compatible with the OpenAI SDK interface and delivers sub-second response latency.
use_case: Used as the LLM backend to generate answers from retrieved context.

description: LangChain is a Python framework for building LLM-powered applications. It provides composable abstractions for document loading, text splitting, embedding, vector stores, and LLM chains.
use_case: Used to orchestrate the full RAG pipeline from document ingestion to answer generation.

description: Streamlit is a Python library for building interactive web applications. It provides built-in chat_message components and session state management, making it ideal for chatbot interfaces.
use_case: Used to build the conversational chat interface for the RAG assistant.

description: python-dotenv loads environment variables from a .env file into the process environment at runtime. This keeps API keys and secrets out of source code and version control.
use_case: Used to securely load the GROQ_API_KEY from the .env file.
